spec.expr: sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) / (sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + 0.000001)

sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) / (sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + 0.000001)

sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) / (sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + 0.000001)

sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) / (sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + 0.000001)

spec.description: Percentage of queries for which we receive chits on time.
spec.title: Percentage of Successful Queries

spec.expr: (sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m]))) / (sum by (chain) (rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_validations_content{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_inits_state{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_executions{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_validations_state{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_trie{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_writes{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_account_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_storage_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_snapshot_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_triedb_commits{chain="${chain}"}[1m]) + rate(avalanche_evm_eth_chain_block_signature_recovery{chain="${chain}"}[1m])) + 0.000001)

spec.description: The average time between a block's issuance and acceptance by this node over the last 5 minutes.
spec.title: Average Block Acceptance Latency

spec.description: The average time between a block's issuance and rejection by this node over the last 5 minutes.
spec.title: Average Block Rejection Latency

spec.description: The total stake of validators currently "benched" due to poor query responsiveness. Queries to these validators will immediately timeout until they are removed from the "bench."
spec.title: AVAX Benched
Incoming Messages Expired in Last Minute

spec.description: Hit rate for the cache where the key is the byte representation of the block, and the value is the block's ID
spec.title: Block ID Cache Hit Rate

spec.description: Hit rate for the decided block cache
spec.title: Decided Cache Hit Rate

spec.description: Hit rate for the missing block cache
spec.title: Missing Block Cache Hit Rate

spec.description: Hit rate for the unverified block cache
spec.title: Unverified Block Cache Hit Rate

spec.description:
Measures how much of each second is being spent handling different kinds of messages on the C-Chain.
The value for chits, for example, is the number of seconds spent handling chits messages per second, over the last 30 seconds.
spec.title: Message Handling Time (Total)

spec.description:
Measures how long each kind of request on the C-Chain takes to handle.
The value for chits, for example, is how long, in seconds, it takes to handle a chits message.
spec.title: Message Handling Time (per Message)

spec.description: Measures how many of each kind of message are received per second on the C-Chain.
spec.title: Messages Received per Second

spec.description: Amount of time in seconds the FFI library spent gathering metric information. Does not include the time the wrapper library spends translating it into protobuf data.
spec.title: Firewood: Metrics Gather Time

spec.description: Rate of proposal creation, commits, and discards.
spec.title: Firewood: Proposal Rate

spec.description: End-to-end duration for proposal commits and proposal creation.
spec.title: Firewood: Proposal Latency

spec.description: Current count of in-memory revisions, open proposals, and nodes awaiting deletion.
spec.title: Firewood: Revision Status

spec.description: Rate of durable commits to disk and times commits stalled waiting for a persist permit.
spec.title: Firewood: Commit Rate

spec.description: Rate of Merkle trie node inserts by structural result, removes, and change-proof iterations.
spec.title: Firewood: Trie Operations

spec.description: Duration of background persist-worker cycle, node flush, old-revision reap, and persist-channel submission.
spec.title: Firewood: Persist Worker Latency

spec.description: Time callers wait to acquire internal locks. High tail latencies indicate write-read contention between concurrent commits and proposals.
spec.title: Firewood: Lock Contention

spec.description: Rate of bytes appended to end-of-file, reused from free list, returned to free list, and wasted due to internal fragmentation.
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Allocation

spec.description: Current database file size in bytes after each persist cycle.
spec.title: Firewood: Database Size

spec.description: Hit rate for the node cache and free-list cache. Target: >90% node cache, >80% freelist cache.
spec.title: Firewood: Node Cache Hit Rate

spec.description: Current node cache memory usage versus configured limit.
spec.title: Firewood: Node Cache Memory

spec.description: Bytes read from and written to disk per second.
spec.title: Firewood: Disk I/O Byte Throughput

spec.description: Per-read latency: spans nanoseconds for cached pages to milliseconds for cold storage.
spec.title: Firewood: I/O Read Latency

spec.description: P90 latency for Go-side proof marshal and unmarshal operations, by proof type.
spec.title: Firewood: Proof Serialization

spec.description: Duration of propose and commit operations during trie replay.
spec.title: Firewood: Replay Latency

spec.description: Number of disk read and write operations per second.
spec.title: Firewood: Disk I/O Operation Rate

spec.description: Node reads by source — cache (in-memory) vs. file (disk).
spec.title: Firewood: Node Read Rate

spec.description: Rate of node allocations and deletions per size class.
spec.title: Firewood: Node Allocation Rate

spec.description: Current entry counts in free-list size classes and the free-list LRU cache.
spec.title: Firewood: Free List State

spec.description: Rate of root-store persist attempts (by success) and root-store lookups.
spec.title: Firewood: Root Store

spec.description: Root-store persist duration p50/p99 by success. Classic histogram.
spec.title: Firewood: Persist Root Store Latency

spec.description: Rate of range-proof merge operations via FFI.
spec.title: Firewood: Proof Merge Rate

spec.description: io_uring submission-queue event rates. Only populated when Firewood is built with the io-uring feature.
spec.title: Firewood: io_uring Diagnostics

spec.description: Number of deferred-persistence permits currently available vs. the configured limit.
spec.title: Firewood: Persist Permits

spec.description: jemalloc allocator memory statistics. Only populated when Firewood is built with jemalloc (FFI build).
spec.title: Firewood: jemalloc Memory

spec.description: jemalloc metadata and retained (unreturned) virtual memory.
spec.title: Firewood: jemalloc Overhead

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of rate for storage bytes reused across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Reused by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing rate for storage bytes reused with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Reused by Index (Lines)

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of rate for storage bytes appended across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Appended by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing rate for storage bytes appended with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Appended by Index (Lines)

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of rate for storage bytes freed across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Freed by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing rate for storage bytes freed with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Freed by Index (Lines)

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of rate for storage bytes wasted across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Wasted by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing rate for storage bytes wasted with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Storage Bytes Wasted by Index (Lines)

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of rate for nodes allocated across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Nodes Allocated by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing rate for nodes allocated with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Nodes Allocated by Index (Lines)

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of rate for nodes deleted across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Nodes Deleted by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing rate for nodes deleted with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Nodes Deleted by Index (Lines)

spec.description: Stacked area chart showing the distribution of gauge value for free list entries across free-list size classes (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Free List Entries by Index (Stacked)

spec.description: Line chart showing gauge value for free list entries with a separate line per free-list size class (index label).
spec.title: Firewood: Free List Entries by Index (Lines)
